downloads.urlPlaceholder: Paste a video or playlist URL...
downloads.emptyText: Paste a URL above to get started

history.title: Download History
history.showingLimited: Showing {shown} of {total} entries. Search to narrow the list.

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoPasteDescription: Automatically paste YouTube URLs from clipboard when opening the Downloads tab
settings.cookiesDescription: Required to download age-restricted or private videos/playlists. We can load these from your browser or a file.
settings.cookiesFilePlaceholder: Select a Netscape format cookie text file...
settings.cookiesBrowserRunningWarning: Closing the browser is required. Chromium-based browsers (Chrome, Edge, Brave, Vivaldi, Opera, Whale) lock their cookie database when running, which prevents yt-dlp from reading them.
settings.speedLimitDescription: Cap maximum download speed per file.
settings.customArgsDescription: Add extra yt-dlp command-line options. Paste one option per line or separated by spaces.

setup.title: KoalaPull Setup
setup.description: Required tools (yt-dlp, ffmpeg) need to be downloaded first.

help.title: Help

steps.oneText: Copy the link of the video or playlist you want to download from your browser.
steps.twoText: Paste the link into the KoalaPull search bar and click "Fetch".
steps.threeText: Pick the video quality you want, or choose audio only if you just want MP3.
steps.fourText: Add it to the queue. KoalaPull handles the rest for you.

help.supportedText: A curated snapshot of what yt-dlp can handle across video, social, broadcasters, and audio.

underTheHoodText.one: KoalaPull is a graphical user interface, or GUI. It gives you buttons, menus, and progress bars so you do not need to type terminal commands.
underTheHoodText.two: In the background, KoalaPull uses two open-source tools: yt-dlp for downloading media and FFmpeg for processing, converting, and merging video and audio formats.
underTheHoodText.three: yt-dlp is open source under the MIT License. FFmpeg is also open source, and is mainly licensed under LGPL, with some optional GPL parts depending on the build.
underTheHoodText.four: KoalaPull itself is open source too, and we ship it under the MIT License.
underTheHoodText.five: KoalaPull manages these tools for you automatically, so you get their power without needing to learn or use the command line.

tabs.downloads: Open the Downloads view to fetch media links and manage the active queue.
tabs.history: Open the download history with previous jobs, results, and errors.
tabs.settings: Open app settings for language, appearance, download behavior, and updates.
tabs.help: Open help, usage steps, and supported-site information.

tooltips.urlInput: Paste a direct video or playlist URL here before fetching metadata.
tooltips.clearUrl: Clear the current URL from the input field.
tooltips.fetch: Fetch title, formats, and other metadata for the current URL.
tooltips.formatSelect: Choose the video or audio format that KoalaPull should download.
tooltips.subtitleSelect: Choose whether subtitles should be skipped, generated automatically, or embedded.
tooltips.containerSelect: Choose the output container or audio format for the download.
tooltips.addToQueue: Add the current media selection to the download queue.
tooltips.downloadList: Shows queued, active, finished, failed, and cancelled downloads.
tooltips.clearCompleted: Remove completed, failed, and cancelled downloads from the visible queue.
tooltips.openOutputFolder: Open the output folder where finished downloads are stored.
tooltips.cancelDownload: Cancel this queued or active download.
tooltips.searchHistory: Search previous downloads by title or source URL.
tooltips.clearHistory: Delete every saved history entry from the app.
tooltips.deleteHistoryEntry: Delete this single history entry from the app.
tooltips.themeDark: Switch the app to the dark color theme.
tooltips.themeLight: Switch the app to the light color theme.
tooltips.languageSelect: Choose which display language KoalaPull should use across the interface.
tooltips.downloadLocation: Shows the folder where new downloads will be saved.
tooltips.changeFolder: Choose a different default download folder.
tooltips.maxConcurrency: Set how many downloads KoalaPull may run in parallel at the same time.
tooltips.autoPaste: Turn automatic YouTube URL pasting from the clipboard on or off.
tooltips.versionKoalaPull: Open the KoalaPull project page and view the current app version.
tooltips.versionYtdlp: Open the yt-dlp project page and view the installed yt-dlp version.
tooltips.versionFfmpeg: Open the FFmpeg download page and view the installed FFmpeg version.
tooltips.viewRelease: Open the latest KoalaPull release page in your browser.
tooltips.redownloadDependencies: Download or refresh the managed yt-dlp and FFmpeg tools.
tooltips.openBinFolder: Open the folder where yt-dlp and FFmpeg are stored.
tooltips.helpSteps: A quick step-by-step guide for downloading media with KoalaPull.
tooltips.supportedSites: A sample of sites and services supported through yt-dlp.
tooltips.viewAllSites: Open the full yt-dlp supported-sites list in your browser.
tooltips.openSite: Open the website for {site} in your browser.
tooltips.underTheHood: Background information about KoalaPull, yt-dlp, FFmpeg, and licensing.
